trade_result.sum_signed_trade_activity_c.aggregation: sum over trades of target-weighted round-trip fee and slippage cost
trade_result.sum_signed_trade_activity_c.asymmetry: linear cost approximation; not venue-specific execution cost accounting
trade_result.sum_signed_trade_activity_c.base: signed target-weighted trade activity; not portfolio NAV
trade_result.sum_signed_trade_activity_c.name: trade_result.sum_signed_trade_activity_cost

trade_result.sum_signed_trade_activity_f.aggregation: sum over engine-held intervals of supplied funding adjustments
trade_result.sum_signed_trade_activity_f.asymmetry: linear additive funding adjustment; not a cash ledger or portfolio funding accrual model
trade_result.sum_signed_trade_activity_f.base: signed target-weighted trade activity; not portfolio NAV
trade_result.sum_signed_trade_activity_f.name: trade_result.sum_signed_trade_activity_funding

trade_result.sum_signed_trade_activity_g.aggregation: sum over trades of signed target-weighted price return
trade_result.sum_signed_trade_activity_g.asymmetry: not comparable to NAV-path total return without an explicit backend agreement test
trade_result.sum_signed_trade_activity_g.base: signed target-weighted trade activity; not portfolio NAV
trade_result.sum_signed_trade_activity_g.name: trade_result.sum_signed_trade_activity_gross

trade_result.sum_signed_trade_activity_n.aggregation: gross plus funding minus cost, summed over trades
trade_result.sum_signed_trade_activity_n.asymmetry: not comparable to NAV-path total return without an explicit backend agreement test
trade_result.sum_signed_trade_activity_n.base: signed target-weighted trade activity; not portfolio NAV
trade_result.sum_signed_trade_activity_n.name: trade_result.sum_signed_trade_activity_net
